<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project: Web-based vaststellingen management system for utility companies
	Technology: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSON
	Features: Central data management, inspection forms, admin interface, archival system

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project structure created with src/, data/, archive/, css/, js/ directories
	Central config.json implemented for data management

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented centralized data management system with DataManager class
	Created integrated web interface with dashboard, forms, management, and archive
	Solved the coupling problem between V3 files through central configuration

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed - pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript project

- [x] Compile the Project
	No compilation needed - ready to run in any modern web browser

- [x] Create and Run Task
	No build tasks needed - static web application

- [x] Launch the Project
	Ready to launch - open index.html in web browser

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	Comprehensive README.md created with setup, troubleshooting, and migration guide
